mapper.select: SELECT r.code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.type = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.is_enabled = 1;

SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN sys_role_perm rp ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN sys_perm p ON rp.perm_id = p.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.type = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.is_enabled = 1;

SELECT om.node_id AS node_id, r.code AS role_code FROM org_member om JOIN sys_role r ON om.role_id = r.id WHERE om.user_id = #{userId} AND om.is_deleted = 0 AND r.type = 2 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.is_enabled = 1;

SELECT om.node_id AS node_id, p.code AS perm_code FROM org_member om JOIN sys_role r ON om.role_id = r.id JOIN sys_role_perm rp ON om.role_id = rp.role_id JOIN sys_perm p ON rp.perm_id = p.id WHERE om.user_id = #{userId} AND om.is_deleted = 0; AND r.type = 2 AND r.is_enabled = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0;
